topic: Automated invoicing per service for PRO firms — billing 30 clients in the time it used to take to bill three
format: Lead with a quote or question from a customer, then explain the feature built in response
post:
PRO firms billing 30 clients in the same time it used to take to bill three. The difference isn't extra staff — it's invoicing that's built around how PRO work actually runs.

We hear this from PRO service firms across Oman and the GCC. A lot. So we built automated invoicing per service, and it's genuinely changed how our customers close out their month.

Here's the actual problem: most PRO firms handle a mix of services — visa processing, work permits, Omanization filings, Sanad office management. Every client uses a different combination. Billing manually means digging through notes, chasing approvals, and rebuilding the same invoice logic from scratch. Thirty clients. Every month.

In SmartPro Hub, each service carries its own billing rule. When work is completed, the invoice generates automatically — right fee, right client, right service line. No reconstruction, no hunting through old notes.

That's how you get to 30 clients in the time it once took to handle three.

This isn't a standalone add-on either. It sits inside a broader PRO automation platform connected to your client portal, contracts, and compliance workflows — so everything talks to each other.

If your team is still losing days to invoicing every month, that time has better uses.

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
